notes: Fun fact: Canada has more lakes than the rest of the world combined. Over 60 percent of all the lakes on Earth are in Canada. Let that sink in.
highlights: Liked: The diversity is genuine, not performative. You hear five languages walking one city block. Multiculturalism done right.
Did not like: Distances between cities are deceptive. Canada is the second-largest country on Earth, and you feel every kilometer.
